site.title: ION Print & Promo
site.description: Gibson Print, PROS Marketing and IO Promo have become ION Print & Promo! We've moved to 178 Tiffin St. Barrie, offering even MORE print services & promo products for enhanced business success.

hero.title: Print & Promo Services Together.
hero.description: Power up with quality Print & Promo Services across Simcoe & Muskoka!

centreText.title: Comprehensive services tailored to your needs.
centreText.description: Our name and location may have changed, but our staffing, commitment to quality and great service remains the same.

cards.name: Printing Services
cards.description: Expert digital and large-format printing that helps every business stand out with style.

cards.name: Sign Services
cards.description: We deliver real estate and large-format signs that make your business stand out.

cards.name: Promotional Products
cards.description: Custom promotional products that strengthen your brand identity.

cards.name: Graphic Design
cards.description: Visual strategies converting ideas into powerful designs.

cards.name: Web Development
cards.description: Custom web development showcasing responsive, user-friendly digital experiences.

cards.name: Realtor Services
cards.description: Professional real estate sign printing and installation services.

features.title: Printing Services
features.description:
We deliver high-quality print products in all shapes, sizes and formats, from simple projects to bold full-colour displays, including real estate signs and installations.

Our experienced design and print team works with you to keep your brand sharp, consistent and professional.
features.imageAlt: Professional printing equipment and promotional materials showcase

features.title: Sign Services
features.description:
From real estate signs to large-format displays, we deliver signage solutions that make your business impossible to miss.

Our team handles everything from design through to professional installation, so your brand shows up sharp every time.

features.title: Promotional Products
features.description:
Why juggle multiple suppliers when you can get everything in one place? From custom merchandise to branded apparel and gifts, we help your organization stand out.

ION Print & Promo, formerly IO Promo, keeps your brand polished and top of mind.
features.imageAlt: Team collaboration and creative workspace at ION Print & Promo

features.title: Design & Web
features.description:
Along with in-house graphic design, print and promotional services, our team can also support your website, copywriting and marketing needs.

We keep your brand sharp, consistent and professional everywhere it appears.
features.imageAlt: Professional design and digital services showcase

items.content: Cindy was super helpful and very professional in creating the lettering for my new boat. She listened to what I wanted, offered great suggestions, and delivered high-quality work. A genuinely nice person - highly recommended!
items.author: Scott Ingham

items.content: We've had the pleasure of working with IO Promo on multiple projects, and Rob has become a trusted promotional partner. His professionalism, creativity, and dedication consistently exceed our expectations, always delivering high-quality results.
items.author: Liliana Salazar

items.content: Glenn and his team are absolutely wonderful to work with. We do lots of work with Gibson's Digital Print Design & Sign, varying from new signage, flags and graphics to repairs for existing. They are always quick to respond and complete all work that is requested. Definitely suggest them for any future sign work.
items.author: Katlyn Hunter
